hints: Iterate through each character in the ISBN string
Skip dashes - they don't affect the calculation
Use a multiplier that starts at 10 and decreases by 1 for each digit
Handle 'X' specially - it represents 10 and is only valid as the last digit
After processing all characters, check that the multiplier is 0 (meaning exactly 10 digits were found)
The ISBN is valid if the total sum is divisible by 11
